productDisplayName: Fila Men Madera Orange Flip Flops
description: flip flops from fila are made with the finest raw materials crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. This pair of flip flops from fila is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. Wear this pair with your off-duty ensembles. Upper Fabric thong style straps with a fabric toe separator Synthetic leather applique on the crux of the straps Soft rubber footbed with printed branding Outsole TPU outsole with exaggerated herringbone patterning Sandal care Rub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
